name: broker-package-composer
rationale: Clean intake → admin approves prelim → F4.BP broker-package composer fires (composeBrokerLenderPackageEmail). Broker receives HTML email with greeting + lead-in + Snapshot + attachment-listing + Franco-pointer + signoff structure; attachments include R9-G deal package zip. Distinct from B09 which asserts F2.PA gate firing; D05 asserts F4.BP composer CONTENT (per Porter framing #3 two-assertion discipline).
notes: Two-event sequence — intake + admin approval. Assertion focus: broker-package email STRUCTURE and CONTENT, including attachment-list + Franco-pointer + R10-H sweep applied.
